fields.helpText: The .01 field is the facility number.
This field holds the name of the facility radiology ADPAC, or the person who performs the actions of the ADPAC.
This is the number of days for automatic deactivation of a new procedure. This date is deleted by the NTRT approval and local mapping of the new procedure.
This field will be null until the matching of the RAD/NUC MED PROCEDURE file to the MASTER RADIOLOGY PROCEDURE file.  When matching is complete this field will be set to 'YES'.

This is the last procedure to be matched from the RAD/NUC MED PROCEDURES  file.  This will be the starting point if the matching process has been interrupted and the MATCHING COMPLETE field is not set to YES.
If a response with the new procedure data is not received from NTRT in this amount of time a reminder bulletin will be sent.
This field holds the name of the local mailgroup that will receive messages from the NTRT team.
This is the path for the ISAAC SCHEMA NAME that ISAAC will use to process incoming Radiology NTRT requests.
When ISAAC comes on line any changes in the processing of data that is different from the method used by VETS will be used.
This field will indicate that the MASTER RADIOLOGY PROCEDURE FILE (#71.99) has been seeded with the national procedures.
This field holds the port number for accessing the NTRT directory in AITC that will hold the nbew procedure request.
This is the ip address for the NTRT server at the AITC
This is the IP address for the repository of messages to NTRT on the NTRT server at AITC which will hold the NTRT new procedure requests.
This is the schema name that ISAAC will use to process Radiology NTRT request XML's. Example is 'ISAAC-NTRT.XSD'.
